argv:
from pathlib import Path, PureWindowsPath
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260721-071125-0FB108_V1A3A_PYTHON_RUNTIME_MAP")
probes=json.loads((out/r"ISOLATED_RUNTIME_PROBES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
allow={r"Z:\FOXAI\Runtime\Desktop\python\python.exe".casefold(),r"Z:\FOXAI\env\python\python.exe".casefold(),r"Z:\FOXAI\.venv\Scripts\python.exe".casefold(),r"C:\Python314\python.exe".casefold()}
assert probes.get("process_count",99)<=4
assert probes.get("max_concurrent_processes",99)<=1
assert probes.get("sequential_only") is True
assert probes.get("shell_invocation") is False
assert probes.get("pythonw_executed") is False
assert probes.get("pip_invoked") is False
assert probes.get("foxai_source_imported_or_executed") is False
assert probes.get("third_party_modules_imported") is False
attempted=[x for x in probes.get("records",[]) if x.get("attempted")]
assert len(attempted)==probes.get("process_count")
assert [x.get("sequence") for x in attempted]==list(range(1,len(attempted)+1))
assert len({str(x.get("executable","")).casefold() for x in attempted})==len(attempted)
for row in attempted:
    exe=str(row.get("executable","")).casefold()
    assert exe in allow,exe
    assert PureWindowsPath(row.get("executable","")).name.casefold()=="python.exe"
    assert row.get("argv_prefix",[])[1:5]==["-I","-B","-S","-c"]
    assert row.get("shell") is False
    if row.get("status")=="probe_succeeded":
        result=row.get("result",{})
        flags=result.get("flags",{})
        assert flags.get("isolated")==1
        assert flags.get("no_site")==1
        assert flags.get("ignore_environment")==1
        assert flags.get("dont_write_bytecode")==1
for row in probes.get("records",[]):
    assert row.get("status") in {"probe_succeeded","nonzero_exit","timeout","missing_executable","launch_error","malformed_output","blocked_not_allowlisted"}
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3A_EXACT_PROBES_VERIFIED")
